message:
feat(pager,core,vdbe,mvcc): WAL commit sync policy, lightweight schema refresh, VDBE register spans, fused version store lookups

Pager WAL sync policy:
- Add WalCommitSyncPolicy enum (Deferred vs PerCommit) to control whether
  WAL-mode commits sync the WAL file immediately or defer to checkpoint,
  derived from PRAGMA synchronous setting
- Wire policy into PagerInner and SimpleTransaction commit path
- Remove redundant db_path from SimpleTransaction

Schema refresh classification:
- Add lightweight vs full schema refresh counters so hot-path profiling
  can distinguish cheap external schema checks (cookie comparison) from
  expensive full reloads (pager re-read + schema parse)
- Add can_use_lightweight_external_schema_refresh predicate on
  PreparedStatement

VDBE register spans:
- Add OpcodeRegisterSpans struct and opcode_register_spans() function
  that statically maps each VDBE opcode to its read/write register ranges
- Use register span metadata for ahead-of-time register capacity sizing
  and simplified VDBE engine dispatch

Fused version store lookups:
- Add resolve_visible_version() that resolves and clones the visible
  page version in a single arena walk, eliminating the double lock
  acquisition of resolve() + get_version()
- Add chain_head_version() for single-pass head lookup + clone
- Add tests for both methods

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
